steps.title: Distribute 19
steps.content:
Multiply $19$ by both terms inside the parentheses:
$$19(x^2-7)=19x^2-19\cdot7$$

steps.title: Fast choice check
steps.content: A one-value Desmos check also works: compare the original expression with choice A. The graphs overlap exactly. At $x=0$, the original gives $-133$, which already eliminates the other constants.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: $19x^2-133$ matches choice A, so A is correct.
